title: corrigiola perez-larae
intro: Corrigiola perez-larae, also known as the sand-spurry or rock spurry, is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Corrigiola perez-larae include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a potential remedy for minor skin irritations and infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in tinctures, infusions, or topical ointments, allowing its medicinal properties to be effectively harnessed for therapeutic purposes.
